subcodes.title: Public address given on 1912-11-08
subcodes.first_line: God is one, the effulgence of God is one, and humanity constitutes the servants of that one God
subcodes.subjects: @purpose of religion in the world (personal and social), @changing and unchanging parts of religion, @station of the Manifestation of God, @Judaism; the Torah; the Jewish people, @human reality created in the image of God, @knowledge; recognition of God, @oneness; unity of religion, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @unity; oneness of humanity, @prejudice; racial prejudice; class distinction
